policy.nps_rule: NPS-credited multimedia without a copyright symbol is treated as public domain under the copyright language displayed on each NPS detail page.
policy.download_behavior: The acquisition script downloads only records whose status is verified, public-domain, or licensed and fails closed on MIME or dimension mismatch.

assets.license: Public domain under NPS media credit rule
